title: New report reveals the true danger of AI, and it’s not what you think
description: The biggest danger of artificial intelligence is unlikely to be robots becoming too smart — it's humans becoming too dumb. Here's why.
content:
A sweeping new report from researchers at Elon University warns that the biggest threat from artificial intelligence may not be robots becoming too smart — it’s humans succumbing to “superstupidity.”

title: How A.I. Helped One Man (and His Brother) Build a $1.8 Billion Company
description: Who needs more than two employees when artificial intelligence can do so many corporate tasks? It’s super efficient — and a little bit lonely.
content:
